title: VORN Bioenergy Partners with Prado Energia to Expand Biomethane in Portugal
content: VORN Bioenergy has entered a strategic partnership with Prado Energia to accelerate biomethane development in Portugal. Under the agreement, Prado Energia will manage project development using local expertise, while VORN provides technical support, financing, and will eventually construct and operate the facilities. The collaboration kicks off with two projects, each boasting a grid injection capacity of 67 GWh, sufficient to supply 20,000 households. Notably, one project has received "Project of National Potential Interest" (PIN) status, streamlining its permitting. Representing a mid-double-digit million euro investment, these initial plants aim to avoid 75,000 tonnes of CO2 annually. The deal advances VORN's goal of reaching 2 TWh of capacity by 2030 and solidifies its expansion on the Iberian Peninsula.
author: Analysts Account
